metadata.description: Community collection of Apify agent skills for web scraping, data extraction, and automation

plugins.name: apify-easy-competitive-intelligence
plugins.description: Full-stack competitive intelligence with 7 analysis modules: Competitor Snapshot, Pricing Intelligence, Pricing Deep Dive (Nagle decomposition), Review Intelligence, Hiring Signals, Content & SEO, and Market Landscape. 20+ verified Apify actor schemas, multi-module orchestration via subagents, and pre-delivery verification with confidence labeling. Uses Apify CLI (preferred) or MCP. Covers SaaS CI sources: G2, Capterra, Glassdoor, LinkedIn Jobs, Crunchbase, SimilarWeb, Google News, Wayback Machine.

plugins.name: apify-ecommerce
plugins.description: Scrape e-commerce data for pricing intelligence, customer sentiment, product research, quality analysis, and supply chain monitoring across Amazon, Walmart, eBay, IKEA, and 50+ marketplaces

plugins.name: apify-ads-intelligence
plugins.description: Research, spy on, and analyze ads across Meta (Facebook & Instagram), Google (Ads Transparency Center + paid search results), TikTok (Ads Library + Creative Center), LinkedIn Ad Library, and X (Twitter — promoted tweets, best-effort) using Apify Actors. Use when user asks about competitor ads, ad library research, winning creatives, ad copy analysis, landing page audits from ads, cross-platform ad audits, brand transparency checks, or any task involving paid ad creatives, advertiser data, or ad targeting from public ad libraries.

plugins.name: apify-financial-services
plugins.description: Financial company intelligence — news monitoring (33 sources), social listening (Reddit, Twitter/X, Trustpilot), and public registry lookups (11 European countries). 3 skills + portfolio-sweep command.

plugins.name: apify-ai-search-visibility-tracker
plugins.description: Track whether a brand and its competitors get cited or mentioned across Google AI Overviews, Google AI Mode, ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Microsoft Copilot, and Google Gemini for a defined set of prompts, on a recurring schedule

plugins.name: apify-verified-email-finder
plugins.description: Build a list of verified business emails from Google Maps, Google SERPs, or a user-supplied URL list. Verification happens inside the same Apify run — no third-party verifier needed.

plugins.name: apify-link-prospecting-outreach
plugins.description: Find link-building prospects, score them with Ahrefs domain and page authority, identify the strongest pitch angle per row, and draft brand-voice-matched outreach emails with concrete in-article link placements

plugins.name: apify-influencer-brand-collabs
plugins.description: Discover Instagram brand–creator partnerships by chaining Apify Actors against Meta's Ad Library. Audit influencer branded-content history, scope a brand's sponsorship roster, and surface paid collaborations in either direction
